Notes: Probe whether a delete_rr targeting an absent RR within an existing RRset is accepted as a no-op or rejected after rrset_exists has already established the RRset context.

Steps.Description: Require that the TXT RRset exists at x.campus.edu., then attempt to delete a specific TXT RR whose rdata is absent from that RRset.

Steps.Name: x.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original TXT RRset remains unchanged after the update attempt.
